column3:
The ultimate Ibiza fit. Brought to you in a gorgeous crochet fabric and lined for comfort, we’re completely obsessed. Designed with versatility in mind, both tops and bottoms in this collection are available to mix & match with one another. Pair with your fav cowboy boots for a look that’s guaranteed to turn heads.

  • Made from crochet knit textured fabric
  • Lined with supersoft fabric so that it’s not see through
  • Fold over waistband with raw edge detailing
  • Elasticated waistband
  • Set sold separately
  • Sizing runs small so if inbetween sizes we would recommend sizing up

 

Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size 6
Bust: 32
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6
column6: Apparel & Accessories > Clothing > Shorts

column3:
The perfect tanning crochet bikini bottoms. Made with double-layered fabric and adjustable tie sides, allowing you to wear them at any height on your hips for a customizable fit. Designed with smaller panels to give you maximum tanning exposure and minimal tan lines, these bottoms are a fresh, feminine piece with a touch of effortless beach club charm.

With their delicate crochet detailing and flattering shape, these bikini bottoms are made to turn heads whether you’re lounging poolside or soaking up the sun. This is the swim staple you’ll be reaching for again and again all summer long.

  • Thick double layered quality lycra
  • Fully adjustable tie sides, made from stretchy cord
  • Strappy design for minimal tan lines
  • Pair with our matching tan bikini top

Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size 4
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6

The bikini top of the season and the perfect tanning bikini. Our crochet triangle bikini top is made with double-layered fabric and features fully adjustable neck and back tie straps for a flawless, customizable fit. Designed with smaller panels to give you maximum tanning exposure and minimal tan lines, it’s a fresh, feminine piece with a touch of effortless beach club charm.

With its intricate crochet detailing and flattering silhouette, this bikini is made to turn heads whether you’re lounging poolside or soaking up the sun. This is the swim staple you’ll be grabbing over and over again all summer long.

  • Thick double layered quality lycra
  • Fully adjustable halter neck & back tie straps, made from stretchy cord
  • Strappy design for minimal tan lines
  • Pair with our matching tan bikini bottoms
